steps.title: Identify the key requirement
steps.content: The student's goal is stated explicitly: indicate that both soundscapes are on the list. The key requirement is naming both the crickets at Yodo River and the water at Nachi Falls, then confirming both are on the list.

steps.title: Apply the requirement to the choices
steps.content: Choice A explicitly names both soundscapes—“Both the sound of crickets on the banks of the Yodo River and the sound of water flowing over Nachi Falls are on the list”—and confirms both are included. The other three choices each fail to establish both soundscapes: B names only Nachi Falls, C omits both soundscapes, and D names only the crickets as an example. That matches choice A — A is correct.
